// note: Machine-readable structured registry of all swarm elements. See AGENTS.md (human-readable) and !/AGENTS.md (canonical narrative registry).

agents.name: Gemini CLI
agents.role: The Vault Advisor — narrative lens, political context, Sebald Code
agents.label: agent:gemini

agents.name: GitHub Copilot
agents.role: The Clerk — inline Obsidian markdown & syntax
agents.label: agent:copilot

agents.name: OpenAI Codex CLI
agents.role: The Lexicographer — code generation, refactoring, automated transforms
agents.label: agent:codex
agents.notes: Codex auto-loads repo AGENTS.md instructions. Project-scoped Codex config lives in .codex/config.toml; .codex/CODEX.md is a repo-specific reference shim.

agents.name: Grok
agents.autoload_note: Manual injection — no confirmed xAI CLI dotfolder spec
agents.role: The Ironist — rapid reasoning, real-time web access

agents.name: DeepSeek
agents.role: The Analyst — deep reasoning, code analysis, research synthesis

agents.name: Perplexity
agents.role: The Scout — web search and research synthesis

agents.name: Linear Agent
agents.config: cloud — configured in Linear workspace settings
agents.role: Linear workspace AI — context synthesis, issue creation, status tracking
agents.notes: No local dotfolder. Access via Cmd+J, Slack, Teams, @mentions in Linear.

identity_contexts.personal: Logan's personal Microsoft account — Logan controls all settings
identity_contexts.institutional: Idaho Public Television M365 tenant — subject to IPT IT policy

ecosystems.name: Google ecosystem
ecosystems.note: Gemini CLI coding agent is separate — see .gemini/GEMINI.md

systems.name: GitHub
systems.role: Code hosting, PRs, Issues, GitHub Actions

systems.name: Linear
systems.github_sync: Bidirectional: PR lifecycle drives issue state (In Progress → In Review → Done). Branch naming or magic words (closes ENG-123) link PRs to issues.

systems.name: Slack
systems.role: Ephemeral coordination — breadcrumbs only. Not the record.
systems.rule: Durable decisions must be promoted to vault or Linear.

systems.name: Obsidian Sync
systems.role: Private courier for plugin settings and credentials across devices
systems.rule: Plugin data.json files are gitignored — never reach GitHub

template_tracking.policy: Concrete Obsidian template files named by tracked client config must be mirrored here and in manifest.json. Folder-only plugin scopes and private plugin settings must be declared explicitly instead of guessed.

folder_bindings.note: Tracked config exposes a template pool, not concrete template file bindings.

untracked_plugins.note: Plugin settings are intentionally private via Obsidian Sync and are not read into swarm tracking.

protocols.name: LEVELSET
protocols.flag: STEP-0 and STEP-1 in active development
